prophecies.a: 「斯拉夫民族将在未来扮演重要角色。新的文明将从斯拉夫民族中兴起，因为在斯拉夫人的灵魂深处蕴藏着尚未开发的巨大潜力。」
prophecies.q_en: The mission of the Slavic peoples
prophecies.a_en: "The Slavic peoples will play an important role in the future. A new civilization will rise from the Slavic nations, for in the depth of the Slavic soul lies enormous untapped potential."
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.a: 「在未来的新纪元，女性将恢复她的尊严。女性的天赋——爱、温柔和直觉——将被重新认识和尊重。女性将承担起精神教育的使命。」
prophecies.q_en: The elevation of women's status
prophecies.a_en: "In the coming new era, women will reclaim their dignity. Women's gifts — love, tenderness, and intuition — will be recognized and respected anew. Women will take on the mission of spiritual education."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 20世纪下半叶至今，全球女性权利运动取得了显著进展：女性获得投票权、受教育权和就业平等权在大多数国家成为现实。但「精神教育使命」等灵性层面的预测尚无法验证。
prophecies.verdict_en: From the late 20th century onward, the global women's rights movement has made significant progress: women's suffrage, education rights, and employment equality have become reality in most countries. However, the spiritual dimension of 'mission of spiritual education' cannot yet be verified.
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.a: 「未来的科学将承认存在一种更高级的能量，一种智慧的能量，它渗透在一切事物之中。科学家们将认识到，宇宙并非由死的物质组成，而是由活的、有意识的力量组成。」
prophecies.q_en: Convergence of science and spirituality
prophecies.a_en: "Future science will recognize the existence of a higher energy, an intelligent energy, permeating all things. Scientists will realize that the universe is not made of dead matter, but of living, conscious forces."
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.q: 素食与人类饮食的转变
prophecies.a: 「人类将走向素食。肉食是一种旧时代的遗留，它降低人的振动频率。在未来的文明中，人们将以植物、水果和谷物为食，身体将变得更加纯净和健康。」
prophecies.q_en: Vegetarianism and the transformation of human diet
prophecies.a_en: "Humanity will move toward vegetarianism. Meat-eating is a relic of the old era that lowers one's vibrational frequency. In the future civilization, people will live on plants, fruits, and grains, and their bodies will become purer and healthier."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 全球素食和纯素食运动近年来显著增长。根据市场研究，植物性食品市场在2020年代持续扩大，越来越多的人出于健康和环保原因减少肉食。但人类整体并未转向素食，肉类消费总量仍在增长。
prophecies.verdict_en: The global vegetarian and vegan movement has grown significantly in recent years. Plant-based food markets have expanded continuously in the 2020s, with more people reducing meat consumption for health and environmental reasons. However, humanity has not shifted to vegetarianism overall, and total meat consumption continues to rise.
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.q: 杜诺夫对保加利亚参战的警告
prophecies.a: 「保加利亚不应参战。如果加入战争，将遭受巨大的灾难和损失。」
prophecies.q_en: Deunov's warning to Bulgaria about entering the war
prophecies.a_en: "Bulgaria should not enter the war. If it joins, it will suffer tremendous calamity and loss."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 保加利亚于1915年加入同盟国参战，最终在1918年战败投降。根据《纳伊条约》，保加利亚丧失大片领土，经济遭受重创，数十万人伤亡。
prophecies.verdict_en: Bulgaria joined the Central Powers in 1915 and ultimately surrendered in 1918. Under the Treaty of Neuilly, Bulgaria lost significant territory, suffered severe economic damage, and hundreds of thousands of casualties.
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.q: 关于气候与地球变化的预言
prophecies.a: 「地球的气候将发生巨大变化。一些目前寒冷的地区将变得温暖，而一些温暖的地区将变得寒冷。洪水和干旱将交替出现。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about climate and earth changes
prophecies.a_en: "The earth's climate will undergo enormous changes. Some currently cold regions will become warm, and some warm regions will become cold. Floods and droughts will alternate."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 全球变暖导致极端气候事件频繁发生。北极冰川加速融化，北方航道开通。2024-2025年全球多地经历创纪录高温、洪水和干旱交替。但督诺夫的描述更偏向地磁变化而非人为气候变化。
prophecies.verdict_en: Global warming has led to frequent extreme climate events. Arctic glaciers are melting rapidly, and Northern Sea routes have opened. 2024-2025 saw record temperatures, alternating floods and droughts globally. But Deunov's description leans more toward geomagnetic changes than anthropogenic climate change.
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫1944年临终预言中预测地球气候将在数十年内发生巨变
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's 1944 deathbed prophecy predicted major climate changes within decades

prophecies.a: 「地球将很快经受住一场快速但强烈的火的洗礼。恐怖的事件将被清扫，地球将被净化。上帝是爱。而这股从宇宙深处涌来的火焰将改变一切。」
prophecies.q_en: 1944 deathbed prophecy: Earth's purification
prophecies.a_en: "The Earth will soon be swept by a rapid and intense wave of cosmic fire. Terrible events will be swept away, and the Earth will be purified. God is love. And this fire, surging from the depths of the cosmos, will transform everything."
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.a: 「第六种族将在爱的原则上建立自己的文明。那将是一个全新的种族——心灵之人。他们将居住在一个新的大陆上，那片大陆将为他们从太平洋中升起。」
prophecies.q_en: 1944 deathbed prophecy: the Sixth Race
prophecies.a_en: "The Sixth Race will build its civilization on the principle of love. It will be a new race — people of the heart. They will live on a new continent that will rise for them from the Pacific Ocean."
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.q: 1944年临终预言：地球轴移与气候巨变
prophecies.a: 「地球的轴线将发生偏移，现有的大陆地形将改变。许多地方的气候将发生变化。在你们周围即将融化的冰块中，新地球的种子正在沉睡。」
prophecies.q_en: 1944 deathbed prophecy: Earth axis shift and climate transformation
prophecies.a_en: "The axis of the Earth will shift, and the existing continental formations will change. The climate in many places will be altered. In the ice that is about to melt around you, the seeds of the new Earth are sleeping."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 虽然地球轴线未发生显著偏移，但全球气候变化已成为公认事实。北极和南极冰盖持续融化，海平面上升，极端天气频发。「冰块融化」的描述与当代气候变暖现象存在一定对应。
prophecies.verdict_en: While no significant Earth axis shift has occurred, global climate change is an established reality. Arctic and Antarctic ice caps continue melting, sea levels are rising, and extreme weather events are increasing. The description of 'melting ice' has some correspondence with contemporary global warming.
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.a: 「目前地球上没有任何力量可以阻止已经释放的洪流。现有的一切都将被摧毁和瓦解，一切都将改变。旧的生活模式已经结束了。」
prophecies.q_en: 1944 deathbed prophecy: collapse of the old order
prophecies.a_en: "There is no force on Earth at present that can stop the torrent that has been unleashed. Everything that exists will be destroyed and collapse, everything will change. The old way of life is over."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1945年二战结束后，殖民体系瓦解，联合国成立，冷战格局形成。欧洲和亚洲的旧帝国体制彻底崩塌，世界秩序发生根本性转变，与「旧的生活模式已经结束」的描述高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: After WWII ended in 1945, the colonial system collapsed, the United Nations was established, and the Cold War order emerged. The old imperial systems in Europe and Asia completely disintegrated, and the world order fundamentally transformed — highly consistent with 'the old way of life is over.'
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.a: 「一个新的文化将会出现，它建立在三个基础之上：灵魂的提升、自由和爱。光明、善良和正义将胜利，这只是时间问题。所有宗教将被净化，每一种宗教和教义都将融合为一体。」
prophecies.q_en: 1944 deathbed prophecy: civilization of love
prophecies.a_en: "A new culture will appear, based on three foundations: the elevation of the soul, freedom, and love. Light, goodness, and justice will triumph — it is only a matter of time. All religions will be purified, and every religion and doctrine will merge into one."
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.q: 1944年临终预言：道德转化是必经之路
prophecies.a: 「人类的灵性进化是不可避免的。每个人都将被迫发展出更高的意识。那些拒绝这种转变的人将被自然淘汰。新人类将理解，宇宙万物之间存在着深刻的联系。」
prophecies.q_en: 1944 deathbed prophecy: moral transformation is inevitable
prophecies.a_en: "Humanity's spiritual evolution is inevitable. Everyone will be compelled to develop a higher consciousness. Those who refuse this transformation will be eliminated by nature. The new humanity will understand that there is a profound connection among all things in the universe."
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.q: 1944年临终预言：宇宙之火即将到来
prophecies.a: 「宇宙之火将涤荡一切。数百万人将死去，但人类的意识会因此觉醒。地球将获得新的生命力。只有善良和纯洁的人才能在新的条件下生存。善良本身就是最好的保护。」
prophecies.q_en: 1944 deathbed prophecy: the coming cosmic fire
prophecies.a_en: "The cosmic fire will cleanse everything. Millions will perish, but human consciousness will awaken. The Earth will gain new vitality. Only those who are good and pure will survive under the new conditions. Goodness itself is the best protection."
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.a: 「新的时代是第六种族的时代。你要做好准备，因为我告诉你们，从现在起经过一段不确定的苦难岁月后，一个光明的新世界将要来临。但在此之前，人类还要经历许多磨难。」
prophecies.q_en: 1944 deathbed prophecy: timing of the new era
prophecies.a_en: "The new age is the age of the Sixth Race. Prepare yourselves, for I tell you that after an uncertain period of suffering from now on, a bright new world will come. But before that, humanity must endure many tribulations."
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.a: 「地球将很快被一股巨大的洪流席卷。在几十年内，犯罪和谎言将被消灭。人类的道德将被提升到难以想象的高度。」
prophecies.q_en: 1944 Deathbed Prophecy: Purification of Earth
prophecies.a_en: "The earth will soon be swept by an extraordinary rapid wave. In a few decades, crime and lies will be eliminated. Human morality will be raised to unimagined heights."
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫1944年临终预言中描述的地球净化未指明具体年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's 1944 deathbed prophecy about earth's purification has no specific date

prophecies.a: 「一场可怕的战争即将到来，它将摧毁欧洲，改变世界的版图。」
prophecies.q_en: Deunov's prediction of World War I
prophecies.a_en: "A terrible war is coming that will devastate Europe and redraw the map of the world."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1914年第一次世界大战爆发，欧洲遭受巨大破坏，奥匈帝国、奥斯曼帝国、俄罗斯帝国等相继解体，世界版图被彻底重塑。
prophecies.verdict_en: World War I broke out in 1914, devastating Europe. The Austro-Hungarian, Ottoman, and Russian empires collapsed, and the map of the world was fundamentally redrawn.
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.q: 杜诺夫对第二次世界大战的预言
prophecies.a: 「二十年后将有更大的战争来临，比第一次更为可怕，将覆盖全球。」
prophecies.q_en: Deunov's prediction of World War II
prophecies.a_en: "In twenty years an even greater war will come, more terrible than the first, and it will engulf the entire world."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 第二次世界大战于1939年爆发，规模远超一战，波及全球六大洲，造成超过7000万人死亡。距一战结束约20年，时间预测基本吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: World War II broke out in 1939, far exceeding WWI in scale, affecting six continents and causing over 70 million deaths. It came approximately 20 years after WWI ended, largely matching the time prediction.
prophecies.yearReason: 彼得·杜诺夫在演讲中预言了该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Peter Deunov prophesied this period in his lectures

prophecies.a: 「第六种族将以爱作为生活的基础。人类将进入一个新的纪元，在那里，兄弟情谊和精神觉醒将取代物质追求。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about the Sixth Race
prophecies.a_en: "The Sixth Race will have love as the foundation of life. Humanity will enter a new era where brotherhood and spiritual awakening will replace material pursuits."
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫的种族进化论未指明具体年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's racial evolution theory does not specify an exact year

prophecies.a: 「在新时代，女性将被赋予特殊的使命。她们将重新获得应有的社会地位，并在精神发展中发挥核心作用。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about the status of women
prophecies.a_en: "In the new age, women will be given a special mission. They will regain their rightful social status and play a central role in spiritual development."
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫关于女性地位的预言属于新纪元范畴
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's prophecy about women's status belongs to the new age framework

prophecies.a: 「新时代将以火的洗礼来临。这火将净化一切，只有纯洁的心灵才能通过。整个地球的磁场将被改变。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about the baptism of fire
prophecies.a_en: "The new age will come through a baptism of fire. This fire will purify everything; only pure hearts will pass through. The entire magnetic field of the earth will be changed."
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫关于火之洗礼的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's prophecy about the baptism of fire has no specific date

prophecies.a: 「所有宗教最终将融合为一。不再有教会的围墙和教派的分歧。人类将认识到，所有信仰都源自同一个神圣源泉。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about unification of religions
prophecies.a_en: "All religions will eventually merge into one. There will be no more church walls or sectarian divisions. Humanity will recognize that all faiths spring from the same divine source."
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫的宗教统一预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's prophecy about religious unification has no specific date

prophecies.q: 关于社会制度变革的预言
prophecies.a: 「现有的社会制度将瓦解，取而代之的是基于兄弟情谊和合作的新秩序。金钱的统治将被终结。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about social system transformation
prophecies.a_en: "The existing social system will collapse, replaced by a new order based on brotherhood and cooperation. The rule of money will be ended."
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫关于社会变革的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's prophecy about social transformation has no specific date

prophecies.a: 「人类的意识将经历根本性的转变。人们将发展出目前沉睡的精神能力——心灵感应、预知未来和灵视。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about elevation of consciousness
prophecies.a_en: "Human consciousness will undergo a fundamental transformation. People will develop spiritual abilities currently dormant — telepathy, precognition, and clairvoyance."
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫关于意识提升的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's prophecy about consciousness elevation has no specific date

prophecies.q: 关于斯拉夫民族使命的预言
prophecies.a: 「斯拉夫民族将在新时代的到来中扮演特殊角色。他们的精神深度和集体主义精神将为人类的转变提供基础。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about the Slavic mission
prophecies.a_en: "The Slavic peoples will play a special role in the coming of the new age. Their spiritual depth and collectivist spirit will provide the foundation for humanity's transformation."
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫关于斯拉夫使命的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's prophecy about the Slavic mission has no specific date

prophecies.q: 关于素食主义时代的预言
prophecies.a: 「在新时代，人类将停止杀害和食用动物。素食将成为普遍的饮食方式。对动物的暴力将和对人的暴力一样被视为罪恶。」
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy about the age of vegetarianism
prophecies.a_en: "In the new age, humanity will stop killing and eating animals. Vegetarianism will become the universal diet. Violence toward animals will be regarded as sinful as violence toward humans."
prophecies.yearReason: 督诺夫关于素食时代的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Deunov's prophecy about vegetarianism has no specific date
